RULING - A R G U E D. The matter is first called at 9:30 am. The matter will be recalled at 10:30 am in chambers, after all matters are called on the 9:30 am calendar.

10:30 am. Hearing is held in camera, in chambers and is not reported. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

LAW OFFICES OF PAUL NATHAN; ATTY. PAUL NATHAN HENRY III'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL.

Granted. Order is signed.
